title: Cobblemon Stars
description: The offical mod pack for the Cobblemon Stars server.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0c3a4647d52c326e003e36fb1bb412ce438aa41.jpeg)
### Cobblemon Stars Mod Pack

Welcome to **Cobblemon Stars**, the ultimate mod pack designed to take your Cobblemon Minecraft experience to new heights! Dive into an enriched world filled with exciting features and community-driven gameplay. Here's what you can look forward to:

#### **Key Features:**

1. **Raids:**
   - Team up with friends or other players to tackle challenging raid bosses. Defeat powerful Pokémon to earn exclusive rewards and prove your strength as a trainer.

2. **Tournaments:**
   - Test your skills in our competitive tournaments. Battle against the best trainers on the server for glory, bragging rights, and fantastic prizes. Regularly scheduled tournaments keep the competition fresh and exciting.

3. **Events:**
   - Participate in special events hosted regularly, offering unique challenges and rewards. From holiday-themed events to special one-time-only occurrences, there's always something new happening in Cobblemon Stars.

4. **Global Trading System:**
   - Engage in a vibrant economy with our global trading system. Trade Pokémon, items, and resources with players from all around the world. Build your perfect team and gather the rarest items through fair and dynamic trading.

5. **Poke Hunts:**
   - Embark on thrilling Poke Hunts to find and capture specific Pokémon. Complete hunts to earn rewards, discover new areas, and add rare Pokémon to your collection. Poke Hunts add an adventurous twist to your gameplay.

#### **Why Choose Cobblemon Stars?**

- **Community Focused:** Join a friendly and active community of players who share your passion for Cobblemon. Make new friends, form alliances, and compete in a positive environment.
- **Constant Updates:** Our dedicated team continuously works to bring new content, improvements, and balance adjustments to ensure a fresh and engaging experience.
- **Unique Experience:** Cobblemon Stars combines the best of Cobblemon with unique features and enhancements, creating a mod pack unlike any other.

Explore, battle, trade, and hunt in the exciting world of Cobblemon Stars. Your adventure awaits!

EasyNPC:[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/easy-npc](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/easy-npc)
Voicechat:[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-voice-chat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-voice-chat)
